description: I had been watching the Turkey Vultures leaving the roosts and soaring on the wind. The Black Vulture circled over me several times before it sailed off. Compared with the Turkey Vultures, it had a short, square tail. It was overall more black with only the primary feathers on it's wing a light color. It's wings appeared broader and it flew with them more level something like an eagle. I saw it very clearly as it circled not far above me.
